steps.label: Court Order and Custodian Information Entry
steps.description: On this screen, you will enter all required demographic and domain-specific details for each individual involved in the intake process. The screen guides you through entering court order information, custodian details, judge information, and any special conditions. Clear instructions are provided for each field, and you will be prompted to start the court order entry. Please review all information for accuracy before proceeding. If you need help, hover over the field labels for additional guidance.

fields.label: Start Court Order
fields.error_message: Please click to start entering court order details.

data_validation: Cannot have more than one custodian with the same relationship type for a single individual.
Court Hearing/Order Date cannot be in the future.
Custodian First Name, Last Name, and Relationship are required.
If Custodian Relationship is 'Court-Appointed Guardian', ensure legal documentation is attached.
Judge First Name and Last Name are required.
Special Conditions must be provided if any restrictions are noted in the court order.

buttons.label: Next: Capture Financial Detail
buttons.description: Proceed to enter financial information for the individual.

steps.label: Individual Financial Information Entry
steps.description: This screen allows you to enter financial details for the individual, including income, employment status, and source of income. Please provide accurate and up-to-date information. If the individual is employed, specify the source of income. Use the dropdown to select employment status. All fields are optional unless required by business rules. Review the information before proceeding.

fields.label: Income
fields.error_message: Income must be a valid number.

fields.label: Source of Income
fields.error_message: Source of Income must be provided if employed.

data_validation: If Employment Status is 'Employed', Source of Income is required.
Income must be a valid number.
If Employment Status is 'Retired', Source of Income should reflect retirement benefits.
If Employment Status is 'Student', Source of Income should reflect scholarships or grants if applicable.

buttons.label: Next: Select or Create Client Record
buttons.description: Proceed to select an existing client record or create a new one.
actions: Navigate to Select or Create Client Record

steps.label: Search Master Client Index (MCI)
steps.description: System uses entered identifiers (Full Name, Date of Birth, Social Security Number if provided) to search the Master Client Index (MCI) for potential matches. If matches are found, display a list of possible existing records for user selection. If no match is found, allow user to proceed to create a new client record.

rules.label: Search MCI by Identifiers
rules.logic: When the Intake Specialist triggers the 'Search MCI' process, the system uses the entered Custodian First Name, Custodian Middle Name (if provided), and Custodian Last Name as search criteria to query the Master Client Index (MCI) for potential matches.

rules.label: Display Search Results
rules.logic: If one or more matches are found in the MCI, the system displays a list of possible existing client records for user selection.

rules.label: No Match Found
rules.logic: If no match is found in the MCI, the system allows the user to proceed to create a new client record.

steps.label: Client Record Selection and Additional Arrangements
steps.description: On this screen, you can review and select an existing client record from search results or choose to create a new record if no match is found. You will also enter any visitation arrangements and ongoing supervision requirements. Carefully review the information and ensure all arrangements are documented. If you need to create a new client record, follow the prompts after selection.
data_validation: Visitation Arrangements must be specified if court order includes visitation.
Ongoing Supervision Requirements must be provided if supervision is mandated.
Cannot have conflicting visitation arrangements for the same individual.
If Ongoing Supervision Requirements are entered, ensure responsible party is documented.

buttons.label: Search Master Client Index
buttons.description: Search for existing client records in the Master Client Index using entered identifiers.

buttons.label: Create New Client Record
buttons.description: Create a new client record if no match is found or if a new record is required.

steps.label: Create New Client Record
steps.description: System creates a new client record in the MCI using the entered demographic and domain-specific information. The record is saved and assigned a unique client identifier. System logs the creation event and links the new record to the current Intake.

rules.label: Create Client Record in MCI
rules.logic: If the Intake Specialist chooses to create a new client record, the system uses all entered demographic and domain-specific information to create a new record in the Master Client Index (MCI).

rules.label: Assign Unique Client Identifier
rules.logic: Upon successful creation, the system assigns a unique client identifier to the new record.

rules.label: Log Creation Event
rules.logic: The system logs the creation event, capturing relevant metadata such as timestamp, user ID, and source of creation.

rules.label: Link Record to Intake
rules.logic: The newly created client record is linked to the current Intake process for traceability and future reference.
